scripts.free:ports: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ports = 5173,8000; $allPids = @(); foreach ($p in $ports) { $allPids += (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique) }; $allPids = $allPids | Where-Object { $_ } | Select-Object -Unique; foreach ($procId in $allPids) { try { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; Write-Output 'Ports ready: 5173,8000'"
